Data structures and configurations for GPIO, buttons, I2C, and display on the STM32F4 Silk platform.


## Files
- **[board.h](board.h.md)**: Defines data structures and configurations for GPIO, buttons, and I2C on the STM32F4 platform.
- **[board_definitions.h](board_definitions.h.md)**: Defines board-specific configurations for the Silk platform in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_silk.h](board_silk.h.md)**: Configuration for I2C buses, buttons, and flash pins on the Silk board platform.
- **[display.h](display.h.md)**: Defines display dimensions and shape constants for a rectangular screen.
